parameters.name: deployment_id
parameters.description: The uuidV4 identifier of the deployment under which the update will be uploaded.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A uuidV4 identifier for the update.

parameters.name: app_version
parameters.description: The app version (e.g., 1.0.0) that this update targets.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the update to display in the release history.

parameters.name: disabled
parameters.description: If set to true, disables the update immediately after upload.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the uploaded file (e.g., main.jsbundle).

parameters.name: file_size_bytes
parameters.description: The size of the file in bytes, used to validate the upload.

parameters.name: mandatory
parameters.description: If set to true, marks the update as mandatory for all users.

parameters.name: rollout
parameters.description: The percentage (0–100) of users to gradually roll the update out to.
